violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In use utensils were noted being stored or contacting unclean surfaces. Ice scoop noted laying on unlclean surface.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Carpet or rugs noted used in ice making ( for human consumption) and bagging area.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors where the ice machine is operated noted not easily cleanable. It has partial carpet unfinished wood and broken linoleum tiles. Some other areas of the store are noted with carpet as well. Floors in the ice maker area and the staircase leading to the basment next to the ice machine noted with litter and in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
